# Observability Metrics

**Slug:** `observability-metrics` · **Version:** `2021-03` · **Tools:** 2

Retrieve execution metrics

## untagged

### `observability_metrics__get_monitoring_observability_executions_e`

```
GET /monitoring/observability/executions/{executionId}/component
```

Get component metrics of task runs

This endpoint is used to get component metrics of a given task run.     

To retrieve your metrics data accurately, the process may vary in duration.
	 


**Parameters**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `undefined` | undefined | `string` | no |  |
| `offset` | query | `integer` | no | The start position of the pagination of the entries, greater or equal to 0 |
| `limit` | query | `integer` | no | Number of entries to return. The default value is 50 and the maximum value is 200 |
| `sortBy` | query | `"pid" | "connector_type" | "connector_label" | "connector_id" | "target_connector_type" | "target_label" | "target_id" | "component_start_time_seconds" | "component_connection_rows_total" | "component_execution_duration_milliseconds"` | no | The field by which the returned entries are sorted. The default value is component_start_time_seconds |
| `sortOrder` | query | `"asc" | "desc"` | no | The way in which the returned logs are sorted, desc or asc Whether the order is ascending or descending, a null or an empty field is always placed at the end of the list to be returned in the response |
| `undefined` | undefined | `string` | no |  |


### `observability_metrics__post_monitoring_observability_metrics_com`

```
POST /monitoring/observability/metrics/component
```

Search raw component metrics

Use this API endpoint to query raw component metrics. You can make up to 5 queries per minute.  

To retrieve your metrics data accurately, the process duration may vary.



**Parameters**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `undefined` | undefined | `string` | no |  |

**Request body** (`application/json`): `ComponentQueryRequest`. Schema: `ComponentQueryRequest`.
